name: Older-veteran NR muscle trial is active without posted results
summary: Active-not-recruiting registry testing nicotinamide riboside effects on functional capacity and muscle physiology in older Veterans, with no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT04691986 as active/not recruiting with 74 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Older Veterans with muscle physiology and functional-capacity endpoints
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 74; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
